action_line: repl("Extracting NYT article gift links", "const nytData1 = await page.locator('article a').evaluateAll(els => els.map(a => ({text:(a.innerText||a.textContent||'').trim().replace(/\\s+/g,' '), href:a.href})).filter(x => x.text.includes('Amazon')).slice(0,40));\nconsole.log(JSON.stringify(nytData1, null, 2));")
